Sustainability Cooperation Agreement Signed with Presidency Finance Office

27.04.2023

A Framework Protocol was signed between the Presidency Finance Office and our university for the "Istanbul Sustainable Development and Islamic Finance Center of Excellence" project.

The framework protocol of the "Istanbul Sustainable Development and Islamic Finance Center of Excellence", which will be established under the responsibility of our university, was signed within the scope of the cooperation of the Presidency Finance Office with national and international institutions about to increase the diversity of financial products, especially participation banking instruments, and to develop sustainability practices.

The protocol signed to determine the structure and working principles of the center, and the rights and obligations of the parties, was held in Istanbul with the participation of President of the Presidency Finance Office, Prof. Dr. Göksel Aşan and our Rector Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan.
